nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I find it useful for ideas and for finding relevant equations to use for my calculations, but have found it is too sloppy to let it run the calculations

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate on the project and let the AI work through the solution. However, I must double-check everything to make sure there are no mistakes

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the big question mark over using AI for me is how accurate the information coming from it is

nodes.label: AI for mundane tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me complete mundane tasks such as compiling information, such as collating information and summarising it

nodes.label: AI as skill expander and learning tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have a coding background but I would like to leverage AI to help me write code for automations and APIs

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me complete mundane tasks such as compiling information

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: AI helped me realise I was about to undersize some of the material used which would have led to a failure

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to leverage AI to help me write code for automations and APIs

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for error-checking
nodes.grounding_span: One time I was satisfied when I was designing a mounting bracket for solar panels and AI helped me realise I was about to undersize some of the material used

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inaccuracy in spatial constraints
nodes.grounding_span: One time it left me feeling frustrated was when I was describing field shapes and sizes ... the AI could not grasp what I wanted

nodes.label: Cautious trust with verification
nodes.grounding_span: I must double-check everything to make sure there are no mistakes, but there usually is

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: Some colleagues have found smart ways of interacting with the AI models in ways I have not thought about before

nodes.label: Teacher-correcting-homework verification style
nodes.grounding_span: I will usually let it do it, but double check everything myself, as if I am a teacher correcting homework

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate on the project and let the AI work through the solution
